messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0027",
  "title": "2025年中国移动游戏每季度新品全年收入TOP榜（仅App Store）（亿元）",
  "page_index": 10,
  "page_range": "10"
}

Section text:
## 2025年中国移动游戏每季度新品全年收入TOP榜（仅App Store）（亿元）

message.content: This section presents a ranked data table or figure addressing the financial performance of new mobile game releases in China for 2025. It can answer retrieval questions regarding: **Topics & Entities** (top-grossing new Chinese mobile games, iOS App Store ecosystem, quarterly release cohorts); **Dates** (2025, segmented by Q1–Q4); **Metrics** (full-year revenue per title, measured in 100 million RMB/亿元); and **Evidence Type** (a comparative TOP ranking list restricted to App Store data). The section serves as a reference for identifying high-performing iOS game launches, tracking quarterly monetization trends, and benchmarking annual revenue against release timing in the Chinese mobile gaming market. No definitions, procedures, or specific claims are provided beyond the ranking framework.
